    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings
    This package provides a facility for a settings UI.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.smt.settings  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
    This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.colors 
    Class and Description
    SettingsProvider
    A settings provider is an entry in an SettingsUi.
    SimpleSettingsPanel
    A simple panel for using inside of the SettingsUi.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension 
    Class and Description
    SettingsPanel
    Extension of SimpleSettingsPanel which uses MigLayout to create a nice three-column view.
    SettingsProvider
    A settings provider is an entry in an SettingsUi.
    SimpleSettingsPanel
    A simple panel for using inside of the SettingsUi.
